channel.title: About me on Emanuele Viglianisi
channel.description: Recent content in About me on Emanuele Viglianisi

item.title: DIY Photobooth for My Wedding
item.description:
Last year, I organised my wedding and I really wanted a photobooth station. I had seen them at other weddings and I really wanted to have one as well: guests really have fun with them, and I liked the idea that the guests could print the photo, keep it as a memory of the day, or paste it in the guestbook.

My enthusiasm was dampened when I asked different providers: there was always some logistic problem, or you were asked to pay more than 500 euros for just 3 hours of use.

item.title: How to connect Apple Magic Keyboard with multiple devices
item.description:
How to connect Apple Magic Keyboard with multiple devices Link to heading

Apple Magic Keyboard is one of the most famous / fun-to-use keyboards. I recently got one and wanted to use it with multiple computers and OS. In particular, I mainly use the keyboard connected via Bluetooth to my MacBook Pro, and I’d like to use it with a computer that has both Windows and Ubuntu operative systems.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
Oinkoin Link to heading

Oinkoin is a cross-platform personal finance and expense-tracking application built with Flutter. Manage your personal finances easily and securely with just few taps. It is an offline and ad-free app. (390+ stars, ~1400 monthly active users)

  • Oinkoin on Google Play
  • Oinkoin Pro on Google Play
  • Github

richtigelage.at Link to heading

Built a web app that computes livability score for residential locations based on aggregated results from diverse open-data catalogs and OpenStreetMap. Developed a backend analytics pipeline to aggregate user requests, enabling real-time insights into trending search zones and top-rated locations.
